---
title: "FairHire AI Project"
author: "Group 4: Risk Ready Final Project"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
<br>
Testing Application Created: FairHire AI 
[Click here to access the live FairHire AI Application](https://fairhireai-production.up.railway.app)
<br>
<br>
```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
